channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 136 replies — 544.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 136 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:32 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026460
>>62026423
BUT! That shit ended and ONLY the companies that had actual value emerged victorious. Like think about it. There is only so much stupidity people will buy into, once all of that is don with then only real projects will go up. And please tell me this. Do you see any more stupidity after picture NFTs and meme coins? I can't fathom there will be more stupid shit in the coming bull run. Like what are you going to do? meme NFTs? Like actually think about it. There is no more weird, scammy shit left. All that's left is for us to go back to the roots and actually go back to utility. What do you think Amazon will buy into Trump coin or DOGE? No... Amazon and other Web2 companies will buy into REAL products and projects, like DOT. DOT is literally a WEB 3 CLOUD SERVICE PROVIDER. It's the Amazon Cloud killer. Again, once JAM hits we'll have continous compute and therefore a working cloud that's cheaper, faster and INDEPENDENT of Amazon. Imagine Amazon cloud but with NO downtime. Imagine Amazon cloud but you can't get your service taken down if they don't agree with it (so Amazon with no TOS).

You do REALIZE that we're building Web2 from scratch, right? You do REALIZE that that is the ROOT of decentralization. Web3 is just Web2 decentralized. Everything will become decentralized. Decentralized youtube, Decentralized social media, Decentralized cloud providers, ... EVERYTHING WILL BE DECENTRALIZED. Even governments will at some point become decentralized.

What do you think AI agents will buy? BTC and DOT or US treasury bonds? They'll be buying crypto na BILLIONS of AI agents are coming in the coming years. Guys, we're THIS close to getting AGI. What then? Where will AGI get processed? On the MOTHERFUCKING WEB3 CLOUD of course. Web2 clouds are expensive and take time to build. Web3 clouds are cheap and on-demand.

62026470
>>62026460
Valid points, but to convince the crowd, a lot feel like the market is still being manipulated.

BTC and ETH are still the most recognizable crypro out there. What im saying DOT needs to better market itself

62026504
>>62026470
>Valid points, but to convince the crowd
Nope, convince the programmers. They're the ones who decide to be honest. The crowd "doesn't matter". I can give you quick and easy examples. Netflix. Who decided where the Netflix servers are hosted? The programmers or the users? The programmers Netflix uses Amazon Cloud therefore the end-users use Amazon cloud. Are they even AWARE? Most of them aren't, yet they use them. Do you see what I mean? End-users use what the programmers decide is "best". No sane programmer will be like "Yea, let's use ETH. It can handle up to 100 TPS and we need literally tens, hundreds of TPS". Do you see what I mean? That's why I'm saying that DOT is one of the ONLY viable chains IF NOT THE ONLY ONE. Programmers shift stuff. End users just follow what the programmers do. Everything is in the hand of computer engineers nowadays. They run the show now in the new age. AI, robotics, the internet, GPUs, electric cars, crypto, smart cities, ... It's all a computer engineer thing. The end-users are just kettle and followers.

62026694
>>62026504
Im following loud and clear.

Csn the Polka dot team market itself? What good is a platform if it never gets adopted

62026824
>>62026694
What exactly do you mean by "marketing"? They sponsor a F1 car. They also sponsor the team where Messi in in (picrel). They also go around different CS school around the world talking about DOT. They're present on all the major crypto conferences. I mean. You could just google "does polkadot do marketing?" and you'll probably get more stuff. But the thing is. I'm not so sure how effective some of it's marketing really is. It's not like football fans care about decentralization, right? Heineken marketing it's beer is effective, since football fans tend to drink beer, right? Also one of the DOT wallets is being marketed to gamers in CS tournaments if I'm not mistaken...

62027084
>>62026694
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2036502028281663860 They also constantly organize hackatons like these where they hand out prize money for using the protocol itself. So in this case you had to build shit on the newly launched Polkadot hub.
They also have have grants for builders, here: https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/bounty-dashboard.
Also the JAM protocol is going to have about 20 different clients in multiple different languages in order to make the system robust. Most chains literally just have 1 or 2 implementations and if a bug is found in 1 of them then that could be a serious disaster and halt the whole network or even worse... https://jam.web3.foundation/

62027559
>>62027084
I am under the impression that these hackathons garnered little attention and not many participants

62028035
>>62027559
In the tweet (https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2036502028281663860) it literally says
"
More than 260 teams and 850 hackers participated, building with Solidity on Polkadot Hub across EVM and PVM environments.
"
I'd say that's a big turnout for a hackaton with only a 31k$ prize, where the #1 place is literally just 3k$

62028040
>>62027559
pic related

62028045
>>62027559
https://dorahacks.io/hackathon/polkadot-solidity-hackathon/detail

62028099
>>62027559
By the way, good work Ram Sharma. Say more shit like that in order to make the thread look more organic. Our lord, Gavin Wood, will be very pleased about this and give us many DOTs. "More DOTs !!!"

62028411
100$ end of bull run

62028422
>>62028099
You called Gavin Wood a pedo

62029915
I see that halving worked out well.

62029950
>>62028422
Yes sir. He's the Web3 Epstein. He organized all of the meet ups. What do you think the Blockchain conventions are? They're literally pedo sex orgies.

>>62029915
>>61975396
>I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.

62029954
>>62028422
He's a cheese pizza connoisseur. He's a THE cheese pizza connoisseur. He likes to get in there and taste that pizza really good. He loves them hot out of the oven. He loves to lick them all over in order to mark his pizza slices and then go in HARD and DEEP. He loves to put his cream and sauce all over the last piece and then eat it out. MMMM, the taste of fine young cheese pizza with some sauce and cream on top of it.

62030077
>>62029950
I wasn't expecting an immediate skyrocket, but anything other than a clear downtrend and the worst performer in my portfolio this week.

62030292
>>62030077
Well, that sounds really tough on you. It must feel frustrating

62030357
>>62029950
>>62029954

How would this be good for business?

62030375
>>62030357
Well looks at Epstein. Rich and powerful people tend to love having cheese pizza and doing demonic sacrifices, therefore if we want to play like the big boys we need to host pizza parties in order to attract business

62030629
>>62030375
Not after the fact you've been caught

62030685
>>62030629
True, BUT only 2 people got caught and paid the price. Maxwell and Epstein. What about everyone else who got away with it? So what I'm trying to tell you is that CRIME IS LEGAL even if you get caught. If you're rich and powerful no police officer is going to do anything because they're just a modern day king's guards. Look at the history of the UK police department. The reason the police got created is to get the poor away from the rich. Don't believe me? https://jmmoore.org/2022/09/08/policing-the-poor-a-brief-introduction-to-patrick-colquhoun/

Bro, we live in a world where people PRETEND that kings and queens don't exist. They just masked themselves under the guise of "Presidents" and "tech company CEOs". These are your kings and queens and they do what the fuck they want. If they get caught they just start lying because most of the population is to deluded from Tik Tok and social media to even notice the lies.

62030706
>>62030629
So, if you want to actually "combat crime" then you should educated the police force. If you have weak minded people in the police force then no one is going to do a damn thing about fuck all, right? The police is just a bunch of cowards. That's literally the reason why a lot of them become police officers. They're such fucking cowards and small that they can't live with themselves, therefore they get the badge and with it the "authority" ego. They have 0 authority over their own lives and that's why they seek some kind of authority in their lives by getting the "authority" ego. Think about it. What kind of a person wants to be a police officer? Some guy who has 0 fucking control and then he gets control how? By becoming a police officer. Now he's go the authority of the country. He can't even control his NPD or BPD wife at home and now he gets a badge and suddenly his the big tough guy on the block. UNTOUCHABLE, while at the same time when he gets home his wife basically screams and bellittles him into the ground and he can't do fuck all, because he's a coward and emotionally inept. So, emotionally educated police officers or else no new age king will go to jail. First they'll have to "clean up" at home and settle things with the misses and then only after that they'll be capable enough to clean up their country

62030811
>>62030629
What I see in todays world is that we're going through a liminal time where people have really low EQs. YES, EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE. And because they don't know how to handle their emotions we're all getting fucked because of it. Think about it. If you're a police officers it causes A LOT of cognitive dissonance in your head if you say this sentence "The government that's paying me and I'm working for has a lot of corruption in it. If I go after them then it'll destabilize the country and therefore my own job. What should I do?". The amount of cognitive dissonance these people face is fucking unreal. This is where emotional intelligence plays a HUGE factor and until we get a grip on how emotions work we're all fucked. We all have emotions YET we don't teach Emotions 101 in schools. Emotions, psychology, how the mind works should literally be a course at every step of the way through your education. Dude, when was the last time you used mathematics? Be honest. Never. BUT WE ALL HAVE A FUCKING MIND AND EMOTIONS. Yet most people HAVE NO FUCKING CLUE HOW TO HANDLE THEIR MINDS AND EMOTIONS. And that's literally one of the BIGGEST REASONS why the world is going fucking nowhere. Bro, wake up. Everyone has a limbic system (emotional circuit) and no one knows how to handle his own emotions. It's probably literally the #1 challenge in the world today. Everyone's just psychologically speaking at about 15yo. Look around, we're all children. No one is grown up. Funny saying "Civilization is a nice thing. But it hasn't happened YET". So please guys, learn to handle your emotions and mind so that we can move on as a civilization. So, that we can protect our fucking children from organize grooming and pedo gangs. Please, grow up.

Look at the UK. On one hand you have people saying "We should be tolerant of other races" and on the other "Other races gang rape our children". That's COGNITIVE DISSONANCE. TO BE CONTINUED

62030817
>>62030629
If you've been spoonfeed shit about how we should be tolerant of others then it's fucking hard to say what? It's hard to say "Some people don't deserve tolerance" and it's not even tolerance bro. It's about us having the same degree of tolerance to immigrants than we have to our own people. If a gang of white people gangbangs a 10yo into the ground while holding a knife to her throat they should go to fucking jail. If a gang of Somalis gangbangs a 10yo into the ground while holding a knife to her throat they should go to fucking jail. Do you see how the level of tolerance is literally the same? Yet people have been brainwashed into accepting one and tolerating one, while not accepting the other. And I'm not even saying there's some crazy conspiracy behind it. It's just how people were taught to handle it. And then it causes huge levels of cognitive dissonance and then you get places like the EU where everything is cooked and immigrants are fucking shit up and everyone is being like "Oh, we just need to be more tolerable and it'll work out". Bro... Do you even see the world? It's all based on EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE.

62030898
>>61932834
WTF! Why isn’t DOT pumping??? I’m so tired of waiting

62030958
>>62030898
>WTF! Why isn’t DOT pumping??? I’m so tired of waiting
Did you buy?

62030975
>>62030958
I sold my house Dec 1 2024 and went all in on DOT when Trump got elected and we were all going to get rich when the National Crypto Reserve was going to happen and start a crypto arms race among nations. Instead my $130,000 turned into $9,250

62030981
>>62030975
Ah. I see your problem. You bought. Please sell so that we can pump.

62031390
>>62030685
Listen. Yes there's been a void of rational thinking/ and mentality of kids amongst adults. We can blame Jews or whoever.

However it's because people are so emotional is why Polkadot might never take off. People follow the herd/ take sides on issues/ easily manipulated. Once the general population and business see Gavin Wood was/is a pedo its done over with

item.title: it's over — 63 replies — 252.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
it's over

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:32 UTC

OP

They're going to rugpull the entire US economy

Early replies (first 3)

62020090
I think they can keep the plates spinning for another decade, maybe two.

62020123
>$64 trillion baked in
Fucking hell

62020245
eh I wouldn't worry about it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025522
>>62025491
retard. lobbying isnt bribing. just admit you hate israel lol

62025539
>>62025058
Same parents who had me circumcised
Same parents who either/or
>reeeeee about ice and the poor little browns
>xtians who support Israel and zognald

There might not even be a civilization when it's all said and done. Civilization and all modern fiat will die with the boomers.

62025587
>>62020044
this has been said for 50 years dude. nothing will happen.
>2030
>omg us debt is 549 trillion it's gonna collapse any second now!!!

62025623
OH MY GOD, THE US DEBT IS INCREASING, THIS IS UNHEARD OF

62025633
>>62020361
>her

62025647
>entire economy is based on debt
>90% of debt is owed to the US
if you are worried about the debt you are fucking retarded

62025861
>>62020555
Not a comforting comparison for several well-known reasons.

90% of Japanese government debt is held domestically — by Japanese banks, insurance companies, pension funds, and the Bank of Japan itself. This means Japan is essentially borrowing from itself, so there's no foreign creditor pressure, no currency flight risk, and little chance of a sudden foreign selloff. US debt by contrast has significant foreign ownership (China, Japan, and others hold large portions), making it more vulnerable to geopolitical pressure.

The BOJ owns an extraordinary share of Japanese government bonds through decades of quantitative easing. A government effectively owing money to its own central bank is categorically different from owing it to external creditors.

Japan is the world's largest net creditor — it owns more foreign assets than foreigners own Japanese assets. This means the gross debt figure is offset by enormous foreign holdings.
The US by contrast is the world's largest net debtor nation.

Also, Japanese government debt is held at very low interest rates. But the US is moving at an accelerating pace towards the point where the interest on the debt alone exceeds all revenue.

And Japanese households have traditionally maintained very high savings rates, providing a large domestic pool of capital to absorb government debt. In the USA, on the other hand, the people are up to their eyeballs in their own personal debt and are defaulting at an accelerating pace.

So the USA is actually far more fucked by its debt than Japan.

62027225
>>62025539
Great innit?

My mom was somehow simultaneously a feminist AND a religious christian in highschool so she had double the reasons to cockblock me in every way possible. Missed out on teen pussy because of that psycho.
>BUT WHY ARE YOU SO MENA TO ME NOW SON
SHUT THE FUCK UP BITCH, DON'T CALL ME WHEN I'M DRIVING HOME FROM WORK AT 10 PM BECAUSE I HAVE 3 JOBS

62027228
>>62025647
>>62025861
The US won't collapse, it will jack up taxes on (You) and everyone younger to get back their money, because hte debt was taken out against the future generations.

62027274
>>62020044
this is good

62027392
>>62020044
A debt crisis doesn't necessarily mean the economy goes kaput. They can just inflate the debt away if need be. If the US Gov buys assets like Gold for $5000 and then decides that they are going back to a gold standard where Gold = $10,000 suddenly they have doubled their money, but really they just made the currency worth half as much. This helps with debt though because the debts are still at face value so they can just sell the gold back at the new prices and pay the debts.

Now imagine instead of making it that obvious they buy a bunch of gold at $5000 and then over the course of some years they allow it to rise to $50k. That is 10x and doesn't technically seem like a devaluation occurred, but the assets owned by the government suddenly exceed their liabilities so the government is solvent again.

Even if they don't plan on doing this if the government needs to pay for something really bad they can just print so this might end up happening without any plan for it to happen. Even technically speaking all the scrap steel in the navy might eventually be an asset worth more than all the debt used to pay for it if a commodities go up in price sufficiently.

The problem is that a commodity boom is terrible for the rest of the economy because everyone who needs anything needs to pay the high commodity prices

62027459
>>62024927
g8 b8 m8
the brainwashing no longer works lmao
death to israel

62027463
let's just forgive all debts and move on

62027480
>>62020044
Why did the Supreme Court do this?

62027500
>>62020044
See you bros at the rations line

62027547
>>62025047
US salaries are good though? I mean the whole reason people get paid more here versus some place like Japan is primarily due to inflation.

62028397
>>62020090
Everybody stopped breeding. All industrial and post industrial societies all over the world stopped breeding. There is going to be a giga crash in anything requiring young people in the next 40 years. It likely won't get too bad until the Boomers die off in the 2040's. Life is going to get old and slow for a lot of people all at the same time.

62028408
>>62025522
Kvetching kike is kvetching

62028545
>>62027547
Keep inflating and devaluing the USD against other currencies and you'll see how those 6 figure salaries become comparable to minimum wage in other developed countries.
>>62025647
>90% of the debt is owed to Americans
>one day, the government is just no longer capable to pay the tumorous interest anymore
That's not the own you think you had, anon. There's no free lunches in economics. One day, someone will have to pay the bill.

62028951
>>62028408
why do you love muslims so much?

62029004
>>62020044
It's fine. will just print more money. we can and will print our way out of this scenario

62029911
>>62020044
who’s they?

62029938
>>62029911

62030093
>>62028951
>btfo repeatedly
>*changes argument*
Sad!

62031267
>>62029911
jews

62031352
>>62025861
>90% of Japanese government debt is held domestically
Chat estimated that US debt is 75-80% domestically held.. So it isn't that different from the situation in Japan.

62031376
>>62027392
>They can just inflate the debt away if need be.
The issue is that most of that debt is held by Americans, you "inflate the debt away", that's someone's pension you just made disappear.
There are no accounting gimmick or brutal way out of it..

62031383
Money is a wholly man-made concept. It doesn't matter.

62031391
>>62031383
yeah, we invented money because a barter economy has some real issues i.e. coincidents of mutual wants.
so unless we want to go back to a barter economy, then we need money and it does matter.

62031392
>>62024312

When interest on the debt exceeds all revenue. Probably sooner than you think.

Assumptions: Revenue grows 3.5%/yr (10-yr trend). Spending grows 5.5%/yr (recent trend). All debt — existing and new — rolls over or is issued at 4.3% (current blended market rate). Annual deficit added to debt each year. Starting debt: $36T (FY2024).

Under these assumptions, the model projects interest payments exceed all federal revenue around 2042 — roughly 16 years from now.
A few things worth noting about what the model shows:
The compounding trap. The reason it happens so fast is self-reinforcing: each year's deficit gets added to the debt, which generates more interest, which widens the deficit further, which adds more debt. It's a debt spiral — the same dynamic that destroys household finances, just at sovereign scale.
The crossover is actually worse than it looks. When interest alone exceeds all revenue, the government would still need to fund Social Security, Medicare, defense, and everything else — meaning it would have to borrow 100% of non-interest spending plus interest it can't cover. At that point the only options are default, hyperinflationary money printing, or a catastrophic fiscal restructuring.
The model is arguably optimistic in one respect — it assumes the interest rate stays at 4.3%. In reality, as debt spirals and creditors lose confidence, rates typically rise, accelerating the timeline.
What could change the trajectory:
• A sustained primary surplus (spending cuts + revenue increases) — politically very difficult
• Strong GDP and revenue growth outpacing spending
• A sharp drop in interest rates (the Japan scenario)
• Debt restructuring or default
The CBO's own projections, while less aggressive in their assumptions, tell a similar directional story — just stretched out slightly further. None of the serious fiscal analysts dispute the direction, only the timeline.

item.title: Who’s buying BTC at the dip? — 18 replies — 37.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who’s buying BTC at the dip?

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:12 UTC

OP

Dip incoming, time to stack or wait it out?
Share your moves, bags, or strategies. Let’s see who’s taking advantage of the dip.

Early replies (first 3)

62025264
>>62025259
Might wait another couple of months...

62025266
>>62025264
Try a year.

62025274
>>62025264
Like how many months?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025292
>>62025259
I'm buying aggressively. Everyone and their mom is waiting to buy at an October bottom, so it's going to be a few months earlier than that. I'll be slurping it till the end of summer probably.

62025378
>>62025266
Let's see if you're right

62025418
>>62025259
Just wait for the next dump. This weekend or next Trump will threaten Iran on Friday night or Saturday and TACO before market open on Monday.

62026385
>>62025292
October bottom?
How sure??

62026568
>>62025259
Just started buying a small amount weekly

62027601
>>62025418
but Iran isn't afraid tho. Gotta prepare for what's comin

62027610
BTCISTERS WHY CAN'T WE BREAK THROUGH 70K???

62029592
>>62026568
Small amount like how much?

62029892
>>62027610
Wait for 200k

62029902
>>62026568
nice nice

62030098
>>62027610
Stop crying like a baby

62031274
>>62027610
Embrace the bear. So long as shit keeps shifting along that 1% margin, my living expenses are covered.

62031290
>>62025259
Buy orders set at $40K.
See you on October.

62031293
>>62025259
I'm buying now. I'll buy more when it dips. If it dips.

62031296
If we hit the 50s I'm going to load up so hard.

62029429

62029432

62029433

62029434

62029435

62029437

62029513

cute dog

62029909

yeh i keep seeing that white dog everywhere its so heckin cuteiful

62030224

62030948
>>62029382
Why is this dog all over this board rn? Is this an NFT?

62030967
>>62029382
Good. I literally voted for the fall of the US.

62031054
lilybux to a billybux

62031077
>>62029382
And it will double again in the next 10. Hell it will probably more than double since, the higher the debt, the higher the interest, so you need even more debt to maintain the same spending.
Debt and inflation are going to slowly erode the usa economy until it becomes a paper tiger.
It truly is the Second Roman Empire.

62031110
>>62029382
fucking hell molymeme you are in full force today shilling your garbage scam
are you really that desperate for some money?
you know, if you used this energy to get a job you wouldn't need to try to scam people for pocket change

That dog gave me free money. Now I sleep.

62031406

item.title: ETERNAL REMINDER: PRECIOUS METALS ARE NOT INVESTMENT — 20 replies — 77.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
ETERNAL REMINDER: PRECIOUS METALS ARE NOT INVESTMENT

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:25 UTC

OP

Consider this a PSA for all the spiritual dwarves in /biz/ scamming people into buying rock collections.

For all you have insulted my crypto, your rock collection is rugging harder than the worst of them. PMs is such a bad investment, it loses to Pokémon cards for any time period.

Eternal reminder:
>the bottom of Bitcoin is 65k
>the bottom of Gold is 10 dollars
>Fed ends the silver
>ETFs and treasury bonds outperform PMs without a fraction of the stress and mental illness
>Gold cannot be used to buy groceries, therefore it is useless
>your PMs are not even real, they are a company paper promissing you that the metal exists

PMs provide nothing, besides an accurate metric of how much market leverage is in the hands of the mentally unwell.

Early replies (first 3)

62027469
Oi m8 u betr get ur swarthy daemon handz off mi glittery bits or i''ll rek u sware on me mum

62027555
>>62027446
Who the fuck are you? Captain save a dwarf?

62027581
metals are inverse of oil yawn next

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62027914
>>62027446
>>your PMs are not even real, they are a company paper promissing you that the metal exists

62027925
>>62027446
>you're only up 115.90% over a year

62028487
have sex

62028566
have sex

62028614
The reason people hold metals is because they're hedging on the slight chance of an inflationary run away that wont ever recover. The chance of that happening in our lifetimes or our kids lifetime should match the amount you should hold compared to your entire net worth, which is 5%.

The people who bet their entire lives on a massive economic collapse for America are the same who bought the propaganda of a nuclear war against the USSR. People here who preach about the inevitable collapse of America are off about 300 to 1300 years.

It's common sense, wether you like it or not that if America falls, there will be a millenia of darkness much like the roman empire collapsing.

You won't be saved by hoarding silver or gold. Because Zuckerberg's and Bezos' paid militias will find and ass rape you just for the fun of it. Nazi Germany was successful at parting the jews with their gold forcibly. The Ottoman and Persian empire was successful with enslaving the people they conquered.

This time is different because we're at the tipping point where 24/7 surveillance and robotic agents will enforce a top down rule, possibly forever.

The poors back then were able to revolt because you can't easily replace soldiers, and weapons were an even playing field.

The poors today will have no ability to even fight against sound weapons and soldiers equipped with helmets that can predict enemies behind a wall. Much less robots that will be mass produced for 20k a unit.

The clown show has to keep going until robotic agents leave the proof of concept phase and into production.

62028697
Lick my gold veiny throne OP. I am going into that mineshaft hard and fast. No time to grease those cart tracks.

62028756
>>62027446
Wait, what now?

62028759
>>62028614
>The people who bet their entire lives on a massive economic collapse for America are the same who bought the propaganda of a nuclear war against the USSR.
These are nowhere close to the same situation. One was the result of relentless propaganda aimed at cowing its populace, the other is a narrative the current ruling regime is actively propagandizing against because objective public data supporting that conclusion exists and is obvious.
>You won't be saved by hoarding silver or gold. Because Zuckerberg's and Bezos' paid militias will find and ass rape you just for the fun of it.
They're gonna be too busy fucking their wives' corpses and raiding the pantries of the doomsday bunkers they were hired to protect.
>The poors today will have no ability to even fight against sound weapons and soldiers equipped with helmets that can predict enemies behind a wall. Much less robots that will be mass produced for 20k a unit.
I am a defense contractor and literally all of that is a scam. The US has some mighty weapons but you managed to somehow highlight all of the biggest vaporware projects in the MIC. My Gell-Mann amnesia is completely erased and I can confidently say you have not a single fucking idea about anything you're talking about, and you should shut up now.

62028819
>>62028759
>I'm a totally real defense contractor on an anonymous image board filled with pakistanis and Somalians saar
>Therefore fuck you saar

Great debate there sanjeet. Anyone who tries to butter up their rhetort with an appeal to authority should have their balls lobbed off for using such a brain dead take.

If you were actually a military contractor you would've kept that part quiet and actually had a real point. And yes, silver and gold hoarders are on the same levels of nuclear war scizos.

62029773
Imagine being dumb enough to fall for the gold scam.

Did you really think that you were investing, anon? The rocks are thousands of years old, they won't get more valuable.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JThlN-NX1Dw

62030306
>>62028819
>Your opinion as a professional who works in this space is now le "appeal to authority"
You know what absolutely gives a reply zero authority and zero meaning? Reddit spacing like a third world newfag that just found this site yesterday on his telegram, you stupid fuck.
Not everyone is a minimum wage loser like you, quit projecting and gave fun working a register today while I'm banging booth girls.

62031024
>>62028697
Sure, enjoying working McDonald's once you are done getting scammed.

>>62028614
This is accurate, except it believes PM holders actually have any sense of what their position means. In reality, they are just treating PMs like it is bitcoin, but hoarding it like a rock collection in the mineshaft.

>>62029773
That gold is a scam is a tale as old as civilization itself, but people keep falling for it.

62031031
>>62027446
Holy based

62031189
>>62027446
>stop buying silver goy
>central banks conspire to crash it, therefore it is worthless

62031196
>>62027446
>why would you want to hold wealth outside the bank?
>you should keep everything in a digital account

62031355
>>62031024
Bought most of my gold and silver years ago. Even sold some when it was high. But I did buy a wee bit on the way down into the dip last Friday. I don't care if it goes up or down right now. You aren't getting floored soon Crimex. Should have thought about that when Wormtongue told people to sell everything and put it all in cash. What if not everybody wants all their wealth in cash? Should have left a safe heaven somewhere else if you don't like it.

item.title: My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m… — 26 replies — 9.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m…

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-03-25 15:01 UTC

OP

My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get. I'm shaking in fear right now. What should I do?

Early replies (first 3)

62024372
>>62024371
LISTEN! Close that long. Why would you want to destroy your account?

62024374
You can't print if you stop betting.

62024382
>>62024371
Look here look listen! Listen pimp, you should probably get out of the position

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024384
>>62024372
dont worry, no account is getting destroyed because OP is just a LARP.

62024404
>>62024371
shiiiiieeeet hold that bitch nigga dont puss out like no buster

62024457
I dont understand why people who do these Long or short trades would ever do it with money they can't afford to lose. If you lose all your money you deserve it, hope you don't though, but you're a dumbass either way.

62024467
FUCK FUCK FUCK

62024477
>>62024467
post positions

62024481
>>62024467
Close it and long oil 20x to make your losses back and more! You've got this!

62024624
>>62024467
Anon it’s about to go back under 70k. You have 3 hours at most. Fucking close your position you retard

62024770
>>62024481
Needs an update with the US in the coils crying out to the rest of the world for help. This is pathetic.

62024963
BOOM!

62024979
OP are you alive my nigga

62025027
>>62024371
Lose it all...and next time don't be a dumbfuck.

62025035
>>62025027
>>62024979

He already got double tapped. OP is dealing in the real world, right now.

62025052
>>62024371
thanks for playing

62025070
>>62024371

You were too ugly and awkward to ever get laid anyway. Thanks for playing.

62025130
Bitcoin barely dropped enough to liquidate OP. Feels personal. Like they just wanted OP's money, in particular.

The leverage game is rigged. I'd be pissed.

You pissed OP?

The jews took your money.

62025137
>>62024371
Not make bets like this.

62025141
>Longs the actual literal top of a 5% candle with his life savings using 50x leverage
Either a total larp or your money is in a better place now

62025151
>>62025141
does 50x leverage make you gay or jewish?

62026511
No...

62029919
OP you actin like a lil bitch right now.

62030020
>>62024371
>I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get
you can always work another month at mcdonalds to get it back

62030022
>>62024481
all it takes is another orange lie to get your anus licked by a giant red dildo

62030813
>>62024467
Take that cock like a good girl mumu

item.title: Job Market KMS — 18 replies — 9.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Job Market KMS

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-25 15:44 UTC

OP

Nah fr what the fuck do I have to do to get a fucking job man.

i'm not here to just vent and woe is me blah blah blah but I swear to god my path leading up to this point has only put me at a disadvantage.

went to an ivy league school bc I got a massive scholarship, felt compelled to as people where I'm from don't get that opportunity all that often.

Still had to wait tables to house and feed myself. No time for internships.

Graduate 2020. Perfect timing.

Do what I need to do to make ends meet.

Laid off recently.

No company will give me the time of day unless theres an alumni there.

'underqualified' for most listings bc of unconventional path 'overqualified' for any other job to just make ends meet

95% of job listings are fake.

Fuck me.

Need legit tips. Somewhere to look I haven't thought of, someone's dick I need to suck. Should I start selling drugs?

Early replies (first 3)

62030385
>>62030360
Find a skill people will pay you for. Stop thinking about what you want; think about what your prospective employer wants.

62030397
>>62030385
genius. plenty of skills are had, the issue is finding where to apply them.

62030414
are you a jeet that fell for the cs meme?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62030415
>>62030360
This is the worst job market probably in modern history. Information is being manipulated at high levels. If you find something stable you better hang on.

62030438
>>62030360
feels good that I didn't even go to school, never looked for a job, and still retired by browsing /biz/

62030444
>>62030414
no on both counts. i studied/have worked in advertising/marketing. Lots of soft skills, sales, coordination, building systems, planning campaigns. That type of shit.

62030446
>>62030397
>plenty of skills
That’s good to hear, but no employer offering the type of job you want is looking for a jack of all trades. Everyone has basic communication skills and knows how to use excel. What single niche skill do you have that you’ve put 10,000 hours into?

62030449
>>62030415
bro fucking tell me about it. Stable to me at this point means even a fucking retail job. Can't even find that.

62030455
>>62030360
This is probably on purpose. Let the golem struggle ultra hard so that they cherish their golem position once they finally get it and dont try no funny business.

62030458
Think if everyone was dumb asf. They wouldnt want s soda theyd want a giga big fucking soda, theyd want burgers the size if basketballs. Theyd want a stripper to serve them along with some weed or beer and then theyd go to the shooting range. The next day theyd see some monster trucks and then some ufc.
Well?

62030472
>>62030446
the 'type of job i want' is literally anything that pays. Not looking for a career. Frankly, anything utilizing the skills that I have put thousands of hours into is a waste of time, i.e., diminishing returns. Those things that make me 'special' would be better utilized building something myself. But I digress.

I'm talking about the fact that it seems like I can't even get a job at fucking Starbucks lol

62030488
>>62030360
it took me a year and a half and i got lucky some mid 30s burned out had a midlife crisis so now i have a sick job. my advice is redo your resume with ai. focus it on a skill like: regulation, leadership, analytics, instrumentation..etc.

62030495
>>62030472
I’m sorry to hear you’re having such trouble finding a job anon. I hope you consider my advice if a year goes by and you still can’t find a good position.

62030539
>>62030360
Yeah anon I know, I'm sorry. I too graduated with a bachelors into 2020. Fortunately for me I was the recipient of some nepotism. It's pretty bleak out there rn. I legit think people are soon going to have trouble affording food. Idk what to do about it.

62030905
>>62030360
I moved across the country, booked Airbnb, got security guard job, used offer letter to get cheap apt, then got promoted to supervisor literally for just showing up on time everyday and being polite and friendly to my account manager.

In this supposed HCOL city I’m doing completely fine. Rent is $820, total monthly living expenses are about $1600 on the high end

If you can’t find a job it’s because you suck ass

62030957
>>62030360
See if ULINE has anything for you

62030977
>>62030360
getting a job is impossible now. I applied to 30 positions with less experience and a bachelors years ago and got a job with only two interviews

now im at 300 applied with one interview

62031000
>>62030449
same even retail jobs ghost, its kinda wild. But when i walk into any of these retail or shit jobs its filled with mexicans who dont speak english

its insane

SMCI calls April 2 expiration 30c trading at 0.04 Thank me later

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-25 16:00 UTC

OP

SMCI calls
April 2 expiration
30c trading at 0.04

Thank me later

Early replies (first 3)

62026965
Miss me until they openly bribe the current admin for leniency

62027115
Bro those have 3 delta, there's no shot of that being profitable, unless you have insider information

62027125
>>62026954
How many contract??

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62027145
>>62026954
>>62027115
The 4/17s are a way better deal. I've been eyeing a bull call spread.

62027162
>>62026954
send pic of employee id card with logo only (omit other shit) with timestamp and then i'll believe you in a trade that only an insider would do.

all yall niggas need to sell covered calls on smci. naked calls even.

62027887
>>62026954
lol why is there 4k open interest on these. that you bro?

62027920
I bought 10, fuck it it won't break the bank either way

62028068
>>62026954
noncompliance is unironically bullish...the fine is always cheaper than not taking the action. also, for everything they get caught doing, that's 20+ things they got away with.

62028295
>>62026954
can i ask why?

62028334
>>62027887
I saw that too. Thought about buying several hundred contracts and then saw the ridiculous OI and assumed OP was trying to salvage a bad call

62028390
>>62027887
>>62028334
I think we're confirming live that OP is indeed a homosexual

62030085
>>62027887

is there any way to see when these were bought?

62030237
>>62030085
yeah you can look at the history of the contract and and see when OI spiked, but that's a paid feature on most sites and i ain't paying for shit.
you might be able to reverse engineer it from the info available here:
https://optioncharts.io/option/SMCI/contract/SMCI260402C00030000
but i'm not that clever and also lazy. OP is most likely a faggot.

62030526
>>62026954
Bold bet. I’m not touching anything related to AI because Taiwan is running out of gas and make have to nuke the global chip building industry

62031042
>>62027115
Sure, but you could just go for it....
What's the worst that happens?
Spend 10 calls, lose like $60.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 47 replies — 4.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-25 06:33 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025233
>>62024956
glad to see im not the only meth-eater in town

62025245
>>62025233
bro im still fucking going at it I cant believe I posted in this thread 6 hours ago bro I took another 12mg

most bitter taste in EXISTENCE dude, WHY is it so bitter GOD damn.

62025246
>>62025233
cant stop fcking SCRATCHING MY HEAD GOD DAMNIT!!! my head... im gonna literally scratch all the hair off my head I NEED TO STOP GOD MY HEAD HURTS I cant stop scratching my headddddd

62025249
i THOUGHT IT WAS SUNDAY WE HAD THE FUTURES THING GO ON. its tuesday?

62025258
>>62025245
>>62025246
>>62025249
kek, i use those gelatin capsules when i eat meth i never raw dog it like that

62025268
>>62025258
I be fuckin (not sexually rn atm) getting my milligram weighing scale and just fucking SPLIT THEM CRYSTALINOS until I get the right amount, it works for me! then I just sweep the dusty shit into a bowl and it never really gets wasted. Ah just meth dust all over my table. Caffeine powder too (guarana seed baby).

I use blate papes if I need to but just putting them on the tongue is enough. urgh i was gonna show you a pic of it IRL to show you im not shitting you but I cant find it rn sorry my /biz/igga (/biz/ nigga)

62025279
>>62024669
godspeed anon. I bailed out of MSFT, idk what the case is any more but yeah possible they boost it back up to new ath.
I'm thinking about getting back in just as a hedge against losing my job to AI.

62025284
>>62025268
i can tell ur on sum electrifying shit

62025294
>>62025284
the limit to oral meth: FORGET the mg amount, 10,20,30,40,50,60 FUCKING forget it (actually dont, just cap out at 40mg at once; that's a lot, dont die)

the real limit:
>are your hands blue? STOP.
>heart arrhythmias? STOP.
>traumas resurfacing? STOP.
>eyes popping out? STOP.
etc

once you master that... well it's still fucking bad but ur not really dying. only 3% of meth users are oral. not a lot of data but the slow rise in dopamine implies far lower neurotoxicity. however the vasoconstriction is EXTREMELY bad.

oh goddddd oh godddddd ooohh hohh ogdddddddddddddddd

62025295
>>62025294
>>are your hands blue? STOP.
i remember once i binged and my fingers were blue

that only happened that one time, but man that fucking alarmed me

62025298
>>62025295
>but man that fucking alarmed me
happened to me at a party last friday, I get you. I just remember feeling very guilty, I was born so healthy. we were all born healthy I presume, and it's like we're violating our bodies like this. It's not right. I remember hiding my hands so that nobody noticed, but I looked down I was like "fuck, too much.", indeed it was; like 60mg in a 48 hour span. It really is not worth it.

at least it aint mdpv

62025379
I CANT FUCKING REMEMBER IF I TOOK 10MG MORE OR MORE OR NOT

62025399
>>62025379
Have another nibble, just to be sure fren :3

62025407
>>62025399
GRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR hand isnt blue so yolomolododongo bro

62026933
>>62025379
goddamn nigga

status report????

62026942
>>62026933
IM STILL AWAKKE AHHAHYAHAHAHAHA

62026946
METROBOOMIN we fucking work on this bro we aint stopping until we stopping and we stoppin when want to stopp

62027041
>>62026933
alright listen I dont HEAR voices in my head, but I get FEELINGS and my FEELINGS are telling me you feel guilty because yes this thread made me do this impromptu extended ENDUUURANCE binge and. I wanna tell you dont fuckking feel guilty bro you are fine, listen listen to this if you wanna feel better because this is how I feel right now. I feel great: https://youtu.be/6-8E4Nirh9s

I'm gonna crash maybe 6-8 hours, I have to because there's a part of my mind that know it's not okay to be awake for 2.5 days straight. I think I slept on sunday right?

62027049
>>62027041
I slept on saturday?

62027058
>>62026933
THE FUCK I responded to this guy 1 min after and HE still HASNT RESPONDED, FED RIGHT. FUCKING knew it damnit. wait no im wrong please XuxTjBS9 if you're a federal AGENT just lmk.

FBI = Friendly Bean Inspector

62027062
theres something wrong with me man im sorry >>62026933

you soundcool and I remember everything I just, im not myself

62027078
>>62024567
you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?

62029411
>>62027062
statust report

did u take more?

62029441
>>62029411
i crashed man, i feel alright but man it's honestly funny looking at my posts here lol. I actually went nuts, im gonna chill out for a bit but my brain keeps telling me I should get back to work. the fucking meth use justifies it and it just feeds itself over and over.

honestly I was truly built to be self-employed but man I.... I really should take a break. I havent even properly caught up on my sleep. I appreciate you being patient with me though, I actually accused you of being a fed lmao.

62029444
>>62029411
>did u take more?
right to answer your question no, I went to my bed to "rest my eyes" and slept. like that weird amphetamine sleep where you feel awake and asleep at the same time and get rest at the same time, its so fucking weird.

62029447
>>62029411
i'd show you my stash but this is a blue board lmao. they're nice and clear.

62029634
>>62024567
I am about sick and tired of your bullshit Gordon.
Stop cooking and make the fucking third game you piece of shit.

62029643
>>62029634
I just checked, and not a single half life reference ITT before mine? all of /biz/ are fucking esptein jews sucking each others dicks.

fuck this board.

62029671
>>62027078
>you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?
Everyone on biz knows the worst thing to do with money is buy a house, no! Gamble it in the jewish casino and lose 60% like this homeless retard did.
Let the goyim deal in the real world.

62029686
Crush and rub it on your gums whats the worse that can happen

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 94 replies — 3.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 94 • Updated: 2026-03-24 17:52 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62021380
>>62018101
>>62018864
>>62019087
You all are just jealous

62021435
>>62017496
They got greedy, and it's all full of scammers.

62021478
>>62017623
I used Bumble free and I married a girl I met on there.
2 kids as well.
These apps just match you to actual people. I don't understand the seethe, unless you're ugly of course.

62021549
>>62017496
>Dating app crashes when women realize they can just onlyfags instead
Woah

62021571
>>62021478
You must have been using it in the 2010s. It’s all bots and microtransactions now

62022431
>>62017702
I want a virgin wife, though, not some degenerate whore. casual sex is unpleasant desu.

62023902
>>62019161
Oof a random fag makes u list ur life achievments. I got second hand embarassment from reading ur shit brah.

62023951
>>62017496
Time to pick up some cheapies!

62023997
>>62021049
An 18-year-old wearing that big-ass cubic zirconia on her pointer finger?
I don't think so.

62024069
>>62017702
kys shill

62024197
>>62017623
I think I spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.

It resulted in hookups with 15 girls.
Many of which I hooked up with multiple times.
Some of them were longer FWB situations.
A couple turned into actual relationships.

Even if you assume minimal ROI (only hooking up once) it cost me $40 per girl.
AND the premium features also saved me a lot of time on the app, that's ROI too.
Most of the money was spent in short bursts while abroad on trips when time was limited and I wanted to maximize my pull. I'm pretty sure I'd have missed these opportunities if I wasn't premium boosted to the max and all that.

$600 sounds like a lot of money but $40 a girl really is an amazing deal in my book.
The time sink the app still was is where the pain is, the grind that is dealing with all the flaking and ghosting. THAT is what sucks.

If you'd give me a machine that took $40 and delivered me a fun girl who is looking to hookup every single time I'd pay without hesitation until the end of time.

inb4 poorfags complain $40/g is a lot of money. $600 isn't even, literal peanuts for living out some great sexual fantasies and farming memories for a lifetime.

62024432
>>62019188
These dating sites were plagued with adulterers since the 90's. It was only ever good for people in their late teens to meet each other after 2000. That is where your nostalgia and lack of attention to what was going on with older people trying to find love during those brief glory days. I never tried it to avoid dating someone who was married.

62024446
>>62024197
>spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.
I agree wholeheartedly 100% with the pay approach and have done it myself, but the issue is that $600 won't get you nearly as far as it did 10 years ago due to the failing company greed and algo changes.

62024454
>>62017710
>indians and other non-whites
Serious question; how are white women supposed to use these sites if they always have 800 likes from India everyday?

62024523
dating apps became shitty because they got flooded with normies

a decade ago online dating was still somewhat taboo, you could pick up some hot alt chick looking a for a slutty thrill with minimal effort cuz online dating gave normies the ick

now every one and their mother is on the app, competition is so high you have better odds RETVRNing to tradition and trying your luck at a bar or night club

62024730
Why would I do any of that shit when cocaine is cheap and porn is free? I can stim goon all night and not have to deal with any of the bullshit of dealing with a woman.

62025482
>>62021571
Met her in 2022.

62025787
>>62017496
For those that want good results on dating apps here is some data from 2017 hinge to help increase match rate.

1. Black and white photo
2. Action video
3. Short to the point bio 1-2 sentences
4. Hide education if bachelors or lower
5. Veterinarian, MD, and pilot careers get most matches
6. 6foot + in height
7. Pet pics (dog beats cat) but a horse will beat out all pets and all previous listed information
8. A boat pic will single handedly beat horse height and career and all other listed information. A rowboat will get you matches more that a sports car.

PS this probably won't work now due to today's politics but setting your ethnicity or religion to Jewish will increase your match rate.

62025932
>>62017702
Unless you live in populated dense areas tinder and other dating apps suck

62025946
Is paying for dating apps a rip off for most people?

Chads need not respond.

62026034
What are the odds of finding someone like her GOD DAMN she build for breeding Kek got more insane tinder bumble pulls lol

62026279
>>62026034
you can find women like her at the gym, anon.

62026546
>>62017702
i don't want a hookup, hookups suck, i want a long term lover...

>>62021193
this age can be lowered to 25 if you're in a rural area. But yeah I'm 29 and the FOMO is real. Fuck fuck fuck. What do I do, what do I do, what do I do. Bros.. I don't want to have to choose between fat girls and single moms with negro babies. Apps aren't working and most mutual acquaintances "hey I have this single friend" have fallen through.

62026616
>>62018110
What the hell does this mean

62026623
>>62024730
To each his own

62026639
>>62017496
https://youtu.be/SbQu55bMvZs?t=1566

STOP APPROACHING WOMEN. STOP USING ONLINE APPS. STOP GIVING WOMEN ATTENTION

Stop Asking Women On Dates, stop texting them thinking you are interesting because you are not. The reason you are getting ghosted is because you text and try to be funny, try to make her laugh or sound interesting. If you do manage to go to the next step and are actually meeting up and then get ghosted, stop taking women on dates. That stuff doesn't work anymore in the current year.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pyEdsrfTd6Q

Most importantly stop approaching women, at least for a while. They are already seething and this will only get worse and worse as they get less and less attention from men.
If men can't display a modicum of power over society, this world and women, then I guess they don't hold much power at all.

62026780
>>62019161
Lmao, faggot retard

62027839

62027855
>>62027829
It's closing because it's a huge money pit and they are shifting their focus to compete with Anthropic in coding, they even announced they also announced a shift away from owning data centres to merely renting them

62027856
>>62027821
Remember when google shut down that website which streams games?

62027862
>>62027855
no, it's the jews

62027863
>>62027829
>>62027855
They've been slashing costs left and right because they're doing an IPO later this year, the data centre build out is a mirage, there's simply not enough capital, energy and material to do it

https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/22/openai-data-center-pivot-underscores-wall-street-ipo-concerns.html

62027871
>>62027862
Sam Altman is a Jew though

62027898
>>62027863
they have infinite money. they just realized it was too good prodact to give us . they don't want goyim have access to good tecnology

62027904
>>62027898
OpenAI doesn't have infinite money LOL, not even the likes of Google or META have infinite money and have issued bonds worth billions of dollars to fund this spend

62028008

62028085

they have infinite debt, zero money
openai only exists because they have the chatgpt name at this point

62028137
>>62027821

62028147

still many months to go before IPO

62028203

no they don't

62028253

62028267

Course I member

62028291

Thank god, maybe now we can get back to making money off of shitcoin gambling like we were a few years ago

62028599

62028817
>>62027862
So is Dario Amodei. Very interesting

62028952
>>62028599

Used play music and Google code though

62030212
>>62027821
Its one of the two , either they did this to get attention and then announce a new version of Sora under a different name.. openai is know for their weird hype marketing schemes....OR they found out that Sora is more expensive for run for they get out of and they thought they could sweep the market but that didnt happen since so far AI videos are largely hated and no real use of it for now other than scams and slop. they would focus that compute power to train better LLMs instead to get back to the race

item.title: >At around 6:50 a.m. in New York, S&P 500 e-Mini futures trading on the CME recorded a sharp and isolated jump in volume… — 17 replies — 3.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
>At around 6:50 a.m. in New York, S&P 500 e-Mini futures trading on the CME recorded a sharp and isolated jump in volume…

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-25 12:39 UTC

OP

>At around 6:50 a.m. in New York, S&P 500 e-Mini futures trading on the CME recorded a sharp and isolated jump in volume.
>A similar pattern was observed in oil markets.
>Roughly 15 minutes later, at 7:05 a.m., Trump posted a market-moving announcement about Iran on Truth Social.

Early replies (first 3)

62026406
>>62026390
>another cope thread
jannies do your goddamn job

62026444
>>62026406
please tell me how to cope with insider trading. i cant cope now

62026839
>>62026406
well, kikes manipulating markets...
Look at this miga shill.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026854
>>62026390
>Everything is insiders and le hekkin manipooooooooliation!
Yaaaawn. Get some new material.

62026904
>>62026854
post nose, jew
the only ones not absolutely flipping shit over this are jews that are insider trading.
when everyone finds out how manipulated this all is and where their retirments went, jews are going to burn

62027021
cope posts >>62026406 >>62026854 lmao
go deal in the real world, faggots

62027030
Dude he literally flat out rugpulled his shitcoin in broad daylight. Who would be surprised by this shit? This is the same admin that bombed a country twice during “negotiations” career politicians get my vote for the rest of my life, I thought there was a bottom to moral decay and decency

62027039
>>62027030
where should i put my money if the SP500 & Crypto is rigged?

62027074
>>62026390
Isn't preventing this kind of thing the reason that the SEC exists?

62027708
>>62027074
Sec is a meme, its just another bunch of babayeater jews.

62030067
>>62027074
For futures the relevant regulatory body is the CFTC.
The CFTC hasn't had credibility since the jews killed picrel.

62030080
>>62026390
We've been dealing with blatant market manipulated bullshit from the government for decades. Getting """ elected """ in the usa from the fall of the berlin wall to today was akin to being accepted into the aristocracy. They've been stealing from us for so fucking long I'm glad some greedy retards are doing it out in the open. Since the most egregious benefactors have been in the protected D party, nothing happens. Now that its being obviously perpetrated by the unprotected R party, we're supposed to lose our minds over it.
This isn't something you get away from via regulatory apparatus, a shiny new bill or law, and a stern "NO;" that money (all of it, not just whoever is sitting on trumps cabinet meetings) has to be physically taken back by people. Every congressman and their aides that have more net worth than is mathematically possible needs to be either banished from the country permanently or executed, with all their assets liquidated for tax misappropriation refunds to the plebs.
Anything less than that and we're just cruise controlling to civil war

62030082
>>62027074
Can't go someone who has immunity and can pardon anyone

62030091
>>62030080
What does this have to do with R&D? Trump is just clumsy and obvious about it, so it's getting hard to ignore.

62030264
>>62030091
It means that since it isn't going to be covered up any more (due to the "wrong" people getting in on the corruption grift) something might actually get done about it.
If you haven't nooooticed, there's a trend in the current political climate
>do corrupt thing for years, maybe even decades
>attach trumps likeness and attitude to it
>now its all trumps fault
Its fake, gay, disengenuous, and the most transparent shit ever, but if it can root out any corruption it'll be long term for the better. More than likely, since anybody "elected" to repeat terms is too greedy and full of hubris to be useful, they'll make a big fuss about "getting trump," write a toothless reform bill to do nothing, take a victory lap, and try to continue their personal grift.

62030269
Only goyim dealing with the real world don't have insider knowledge

62030317
i am a goyim who has to deal in the real world. i simply hold ETFs and buy dips.

item.title: Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore. — 44 replies — 3.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-03-25 03:55 UTC

OP

Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.
>at the $15 million and up price point the preference is doorman style apartment buildings, especially if this is a residence and not an investment
Why?

Early replies (first 3)

62013834
Tartaria..

62013851
>>62013830
All the ultra luxury housing in NY is speculative investment. No one lives in those fancy new high rises much less in these "mansions".

62013855
why don't the sellers lower the price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014765
>>62013830
N.

62015476
NYC is a brasil-level shithole to europeans these days. We’d rather livd in the hustle and bustle of our own european cities.

62015477
>>62014099
Yeah exactly, to european standards the metro is fucking ancient and in a very decayed condition.

62015485
>>62014199
Read >>62015476 there are way better cities for hustle and bustle these days. Somehow despite americans living in hyper violent cities with poor infrastructure, their night life is pretty tame and behind in trends compared to europe’s big cities.

62015603
>>62013830
looks like some gangbangers could easily kill you with a driveby shooting and you already put a target on your back buying it

62015736
>>62013874
This, likely. Boomers are in denial that no one can afford their overpriced real estate.

62015742
New york city is really, really crowded. It's hard to move around, either walking, driving, or subway. With that swell comes a lot of noise, dirt, and unpleasant encounters with foreigners.

62018124
>>62014169
Jewyorkers like to visit art galeries, go to theatre, concerts, trendy bars, nightclubs, restaurants...

62018156
>>62018124
Those are literally everywhere.

62022891
Why do chuds laser-focus on the least violent city in the US to talk about crime? NYC is famously much safer than other metros.

62022913
>>62014169
>"New york is the best city in the world"
-someone who's never been to like Tokyo or barcelona or Hong kong or ...

62022968
>>62015742
>really, really crowded
Lol have you been there at all in the past 6 years? There's nobody there except the poors that couldn't afford to leave. Everybody that's still there was just faking it until they made it, which is incredibly shitty advice that stopped being useful 20 years ago. The bridge and tunnel crowd is the only thing keeping it from going under.

62022987
>>62013830
>why aren't richfags buying mansions in a city where the mayor explicitly wants to tax them (and everyone else) to death?!?

62023570
>>62013830
Why is that image so weirdly dark?

62023591
>>62023570
op blocked by the paywall below

62023592
>>62023570
Socio-economic factors.

62024002
>>62023570
Steiny vibes.

62024023
>>62014099
maybe you're foreign or just a hick, but rich people don't use the subway

62024577
>>62013830
Stop posting paywall articles

62024616
>>62024023
Rich people also probably prefer a high rise penthouse or multi floor condo over a street level townhouse in plain view of the street riff raff.

62024673
>>62013830
it's because Mamdani wants to shit diarrhea all over millionaires. Surprise, then millionaires leave for Florida and other based states. whoops. I guess socialism is fucking retarded and doesn't work.

62027174
>>62013830
Weird.
https://reason.com/2026/03/23/new-york-gov-hochul-begs-high-net-worth-refugees-to-return-and-be-taxed/

62027186
These are homes for a very specific niche

>rich people with families

Obviously NYC is attractive to rich people. But as far as families go no, they don't want their kids rubbing shoulders with masses of dirty brown people and feral coons with a socialist brown gypsy mayor.

62027452
>>62015476
What are the best European cities? Like the 2 or 3 best

62028016
>>62024673
East and West Coast are now anti jewish

62028043
>>62013830
It’s weird to live in a 15 million dollar town home on the side of a busy street and sidewalk that crack heads walk by.

62028207
>>62013830
Rich jews left NYC for Florida in droves during Covid and Mamdani finished off the rest, the market for these kind of homes is relatively small, a rich foreigner looking to park money would be better served with any number of luxury high rises catered to their needs.

62028905
>>62024673
Successful socialism has never been tried

62029270
>>62013830

62029321
>buy cramped """house"""
>no yard
>drug encampment outside
>millions of scum a short subway ride away
>get slammed with massive taxes every which way
>extremely high cost of living
>terrible traffic/parking nearby

Honestly someone who WANTED to move to NYC would be better served getting an apartment with a secured lobby. You're above the street scum and have some measure of peace, at least in your home. And if you just want the hustle and bustle you can commute into the city from an actual nice neighborhood when you want like a sane person and dodge most of the stupid taxes.
